summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling; unrelated PRs are kept on their own review paths, with maintainer-review items scoped individually.

actions.reason: Security-shaped boundary and message-delivery changes are out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and must be handled centrally.
Focused feature PR with useful code and author-credit value; keep it open on its own review path rather than close or merge.
Clear standalone draft fix needing proof, not a dedupe or low-signal closeout candidate.
Useful focused UI/gateway PR with active review blockers; keep open independently for author or maintainer follow-up.
Standalone useful fix with review follow-up pending; no closure or merge action is allowed by this job.
Standalone contributor fix with proof/check mismatch; keep open for proof or maintainer review rather than close.
The remaining decision is maintainer technical correctness and risk acceptance; merge and fix actions are blocked by job frontmatter.
Training export and boundary-labeled runtime data handling should be quarantined to central security review for this item only.
Not duplicate or low-signal; clear review blockers exist, so keep independently for author repair.
The remaining decision is maintainer technical correctness and compatibility acceptance; this job cannot merge or raise fixes.
